selected_title: System Analysis Frame of Management Innovation
question: What operational artifact in “System Analysis Frame of Management Innovation” could make the Innovation management feedback loop auditable?

evidence_spans.text: Enterprise Innovation is a complex system which consists of four sub-systems: technology innovation,system innovation,management innovation and market innovation.Among them,technology innovation is the core,system innovation is the foundation,market innovation is both the starting point and terminal,and management innovation is the platform.System analysis frame of management innovation mainly includes four parts: mechanism,content,main body and ability of management innovation.Effective management innovation activities are conducted under the comprehensive action of the above mentioned four parts.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Innovation management, Business through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 71 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
